description: Swiss Cheese Plant (Monstera deliciosa) – Live Potted Indoor Houseplant – Air-Purifying, Easy Care Tropical Plant with Large Split Leaves – 15 cm Pot – UK Grown Add a touch of the tropics to your home with this Swiss Cheese Plant (Monstera deliciosa). Famous for its dramatic split and hole-filled leaves, it’s an easy-care favourite that brings instant jungle style indoors. This live, healthy plant is supplied in a 15cm pot at approximately 40cm tall, ideal for bright rooms with indirect light. As it matures, the leaves develop distinctive perforations that make each plant unique. In its native tropical habitat, the Swiss Cheese Plant sometimes produces fruit, known as the Mexican Breadfruit, with a sweet pineapple-like flavour. Fruiting occurs only on mature plants grown in warm, humid conditions, and is uncommon indoors in the UK. A perfect statement plant for homes, offices, or as a thoughtful green gift that grows with you. Please Note: The plant comes in the nursery pot, which may differ from the main picture. Please note that the shape and size may vary due to the season and growth stage. Plants Orders placed after Thursday 12pm are dispatched on Monday to ensure plant health during transit. --------------------- Product Details: Botanical Name: Monstera deliciosa.
